channel.title: Inflation on Sakthi Priyan H
channel.description: Recent content in Inflation on Sakthi Priyan H

item.title: ₹1 Crore Home Loan — The Reality
item.description: What a ₹1 Crore home loan at 8% truly costs — the gap between nominal fear and real burden across 10, 15, and 20 year tenures.

item.title: ₹1 Crore in 10 Years — The Real Math (With Inflation, Taxes & Growth Plan)
item.description: Most SIP calculators lie to you. Here’s the real math behind ₹1 Crore in 10 years — accounting for inflation, exit tax, and a growing SIP.

item.title: ₹1 Crore in 10 Years — The Real Math
item.description: Why your ₹1 Crore target might need ₹1.79 Crores — inflation, tax, and the truth about wealth planning.

item.title: Real Value EMI Engine: See the TRUE Cost of Loans After Inflation (India)
item.description: Understand the real (inflation-adjusted) cost of loans in India using the RealValue EMI Engine — see what you truly pay over time, post-tax and post-inflation.
